title: spergularia bracteata
intro: Spergularia bracteata, also known as sandspurry, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spergularia bracteata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which are used topically to treat various health conditions.
